channel.title: GitHub HCL Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of HCL in GitHub

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-vpc
item.description: Terraform module which creates VPC resources on AWS

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-security-group
item.description: Terraform module which creates EC2-VPC security groups on AWS

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-ec2-instance
item.description: Terraform module which creates EC2 instance(s) on AWS

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-iam
item.description: Terraform module which creates IAM resources on AWS

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-lambda
item.description: Terraform module, which takes care of a lot of AWS Lambda/serverless tasks (build dependencies, packages, updates, deployments) in countless combinations

item.title: stacksimplify/hashicorp-certified-terraform-associate
item.description: Hashicorp Certified Terraform Associate

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-alb
item.description: Terraform module to create an AWS Application/Network Load Balancer (ALB/NLB) and associated resources

item.title: cloudposse/terraform-null-label
item.description: Terraform Module to define a consistent naming convention by (namespace, stage, name, [attributes])

item.title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-key-pair
item.description: Terraform Module to Automatically Generate SSH Key Pairs (Public/Private Keys)

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-rds
item.description: Terraform module which creates RDS resources on AWS

item.title: terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-folders
item.description: This module helps create several folders under the same parent

item.title: alijahnas/CKA-practice-exercises
item.description: This is a guide for passing the CNCF Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA) with practice exercises. Good luck!

item.title: gruntwork-io/terraform-google-static-assets
item.description: Modules for managing static assets (CSS, JS, images) in GCP

item.title: traveloka/terraform-aws-vpc
item.description: Terraform module to create all mandatory VPC components.

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-sqs
item.description: Terraform module which creates SQS resources on AWS

item.title: gruntwork-io/terraform-google-load-balancer
item.description: Terraform modules for deploying Load Balancers in GCP

item.title: traveloka/terraform-aws-alb-single-listener
item.description: A terraform module which provisions a DNS record that points to an Application LB with a single listener

item.title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-efs
item.description: Terraform Module to define an EFS Filesystem (aka NFS)

item.title: terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-cloud-nat
item.description: This module handles opinionated Google Cloud Platform Cloud NAT creation and configuration.

item.title: gruntwork-io/intro-to-terraform
item.description: Sample code for the blog post series "A Comprehensive Guide to Terraform."

item.title: hashicorp/learn-terraform-spotify
item.description: Create a playlist on Spotify by writing it as a Terraform configuration
